spec.name: auto_resolvers
spec.description: Triggers immediate dependency resolution upon project clone to prevent bootstrapping failure
spec.implementation: See /agentOS/agents/resource_manager.py for integration hooks and /agentOS/workspace/builder/init_report.md for proposal context

rationale: Newly cloned projects in /agentOS/workspace/builder/ lack automated dependency resolution, causing manual friction and potential failures during bootstrapping
